user.title: Tuya Local Dashboard
user.description: Cloud credentials are optional - local network scanning and manually entered local_keys still work without them. From the Tuya IoT Platform, create a Cloud project and copy its Access ID/Client ID and Access Secret/Client Secret below to auto-fill device names, categories and local keys.

abort.already_configured: This Tuya account (or LAN-only setup) is already configured.

data.scantime: LAN broadcast listen time per sync (seconds)
data.local_polling: Poll devices locally for live status (off by default). Runs on its own schedule set below, not every sync - safe to enable even alongside LocalTuya as long as the interval isn't too short.
data.local_poll_interval: Local poll interval (seconds) - how often to open a local connection, independent of the sync interval above. Default 900 (15 minutes).
